meaning: adj.阵风的,多阵风的,起大风的,迸发的
examples: Weather forecasts predict more hot weather, gusty winds, and lightning strikes.
Gusty winds whip Utah wildfire into Salt Lake City suburb.
Gusty winds may blow out of a thunderstorm at speed in excess of 75 miles an hour.
In Northern California, firefighters were battling fires fueled by gusty winds in wine country.
Sharapova admitted her performance against Voracova had been "sloppy", with the gusty conditions playing a part.
